'''Song serpents''' were desert-dwelling snakes from [[Proxima Dibal (planet)|Proxima Dibal]]. They were covered in iridescent feathers and had sets of vocal membranes which vibrated as they breathed. When viewed up close, they appeared to be singing.

[[Sabodor's/Legends|Sabodor's]], an exotic pet store on [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]], sold song serpents to the planet's wealthier citizenry.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1st}}
